seoTitle: Daintree vs Daisy Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Daintree and Daisy Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Daintree vs Daisy Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daintree and Daisy Hill.
heading: Daintree vs Daisy Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daintree, Queensland and Daisy Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daintree has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Daisy Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daintree or Daisy Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daintree has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Daisy Hill scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daintree scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Daisy Hill scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daintree or Daisy Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daintree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
